reviews.comment:
Los chicos son muy atentos pero lentos a la vez. Los baños están demasiado tiempo cerrados. Edito pues no encuentro cómo responder: el día en que yo intenté utilizar el baño (estaba aguardando por cargar combustible y las filas de autos salían a la calle Koessler), lo hice por lo menos cuatro veces. En ninguna de las oportunidades pude hacerlo, pues la empleada no me lo permitió. Así sucedió, delante de mi vista, con varios clientes.

(Translated by Google)
The staff are very attentive but slow at the same time. The bathrooms are closed for too long. I'm editing because I can't find a way to respond: the day I tried to use the bathroom (I was waiting to fill up with gas and the lines of cars stretched out onto Koessler Street), I did so at least four times. I couldn't use it either time because the employee wouldn't let me. This happened, right in front of me, with several customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdjhyV3FnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención de playa deja bastante que desear
Si la intención es mejorarla, obsérvese el discrecional orden de atención por falta de organización, en lugar de justificarla con excusas absurdas y desvinculadas
Para más datos comuniquese conmigo, como socio, no debe ser dificil ubicarme

(Translated by Google)
The beach service leaves much to be desired.
If the intention is to improve it, they should address the arbitrary order of service due to a lack of organization, instead of justifying it with absurd and unrelated excuses.
For more information, please contact me; as a member, I shouldn't be difficult to reach.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvNTVpd0N3EAE
